ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load entry */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the load was recorded */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the recorded load data */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the site where the load is measured */,
  "ptid" INTEGER /* Identifier for the site matching external systems */,
  "load_value" REAL /* Energy load value recorded at the given time */,
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of load */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the load value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the load entry (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the load entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_type_id") REFERENCES load_types ("load_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region where the site is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the site */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the region (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_types" (
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load type */,
  "load_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the load type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Default unit of measurement for the load type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the load type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "load_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load entry this history record refers to */,
  "previous_load_value" REAL /* Previous load value before the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of load */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the load value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the history record (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_history_load_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_id") REFERENCES energy_loads ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_history_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_type_id") REFERENCES load_types ("load_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "load_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the load */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the load was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access log (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_load_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_id") REFERENCES energy_loads ("load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site this summary refers to */,
  "total_load" REAL /* Total load recorded for the site */,
  "average_load" REAL /* Average load calculated for the site */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of load */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the load value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the summary record (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_summaries_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_summaries_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_type_id") REFERENCES load_types ("load_type_id")
)
